title: Viking basketball teams square off with Haines after grueling weekend travel
summary: Petersburg’s Viking basketball teams hit the court in Haines last weekend against the Glacier Bears, after many long hours in transit. The boys’ varsity team solidly won both of their games, and the Lady Vikings lost theirs against a team of seasoned opponents. It was a weekend of grueling travel on planes, ferries, and buses for Petersburg’s high school basketball teams. Rick Brock coaches the Viking varsity boys. He said his...
